resources.string: Tap on the top right hand toggle to enable CM Launcher↗↗↗\n\nAttention: You may receive standard privacy warnings. There\'s no need to worry, no personal data will be collected.

Allow TSF Launcher to expand the notification shade, for use with TSF Actions (gestures).
		Tap the switch in the upper right.

		This is ONLY used to command the system to expand the notification shade or the quick settings shade. No other information is requested or processed from this permission.
Expand Notifications requires enabling TSF Launcher\'s Accessibility service, as this devices does not allow standard apps to expand the notification shade
Application is not installed on your phone.
This is the theme you just look through. Apply it now?
Wow, the themes here are even cooler than iPhone!
Automatically clean up idle memory to improve launcher performance.
If you exit, the download will be stopped. Confirm exiting?
Download stopped, Please check the network.
Please provide as much detail as you can(e.g. the launcher module, issue frequency, operations…):
An unexpected error caused the program to stop .We need your feedback to help us fix the problem. Please be assured that we only collect error information ,not personal information .
Configuration file exists, but is not readable!
New orientation settings for Quick Contacts/ Recently used Menu
New: App Drawer Bottom Menu Toggle
Fixed: System widget no refreshing issue for some devices
For devices need to reset default home launcher after rebooting device.
CM launcher live wallpaper already installed. Apply it now?
CM Launcher theme already installed. Apply it now?
Unfortunately, we could not locate your purchase in Google Play. Please uninstall this copy before installing a new one.
Failed to load, click to retry
Failed to load, click to retry
Download queue is full, please try later.
No ads and faster! Install CM Launcher Pro now.
Keeping launcher persistent will hold it running. To take off the notification of TSF Launcher, please turn it off.
Keeping TSF Launcher persistent will show a notification on the screen,turn it off now?
Backup configuration? Any existing file will be overwritten.
Restore configuration? TSF Launcher will be restarted.
CM Notification shows a badge symbol to remind you to follow up important messages or calls.
Install CM Notification so you don\'t miss important calls or messages.
Export TSF Launcher preferences and layout
Close the folder after click the icon
number of columns for in drawer
number of rows for in drawer
Continuously scroll through all extra desktop
Desktop will remain unlocked. You may manually lock from TSF Settings > Desktop > Lock Desktop.
Desktop will automatically relock after leaving TSF Launcher or the screen turning off.
This function will be released in next version.
Rate TSF Launcher , We will do it better.
This will only work if your system software/ROM supports it and allows third party apps to use it
TSF Notifications is not installed.Do you want to download it from google play?
Vibrate when soft keys are pressed and on certain UI interactions
Center mode，Keep wallpaper size same with vertical screen, no scrollable
Scroll mode,wallpaper scrolls with the desktop
Your device does not support this function.

We are optimizing the TSF Launcher Themes Standard and we will also continue to add more custom elements for the themes. Therefore some of the third party themes could probably cause malfunction to the TSF Launcher. Are you sure to apply this theme?
Please select more than one icon.
Select the icons for batch operation
Are you sure you want to delete the folder?
The full functions requires installed switch widget. Download now?
Long-press it and drag it to the desktop.
This function is not available in the current version.
Select the app icon to hide
Draw a line to mutil-select the icons
Your circling has surpassed the circle limit.
Please update TSF Launcher to the latest version.
Please update this widget to the latest version.
Mark new installed apps with a new icon in the drawer.
TSF Launcher settings will be restored to defaults.Are you sure you want to continue?
TSF Launcher settings will be restored from SD card.Are you sure you want to continue?
Found error at starting TSF Launcher. Do you need to restoring the default setting and restart TSF Launcher?
The smaller scale value you use,the bigger available desktop space and the smaller desktop elements you get. It is suggested to use the default value.
This theme is probably incompatible with the current version.
Theme package parse error. This theme can not be used.
Theme settings is temporarily unavailable in this version
It is found that the program does not run properly, do you want to restart TSF Launcher?
If the error still persists, please contact our Service Centre service@tsfui.com and we will solve the problem for you asap
The current version does not support this wallpaper type.
This operation is to activate the prop’s animation feature, such as Cloud Widget. Keeping on this feature may reduce the standby time. Are you sure to activate it?
This page is not accessable to widgets.
Activate Charge Master to explore more functions of CM Launcher(Contains ads).
Overcharging will harm your battery!\nActivate Charge Master to prevent overcharging (Contains ads).
Low Battery Alert!\nActivate Charge Master to prevent overcharging(Contains ads).
Activate CM Smart Locker and Charge Master to explore more functions of CM Launcher! (This function contains ads)
Activate Charge Master to prevent overcharging! (This function contains ads)
Activate Smart Locker and never miss important messages from your friends!
No more room on this desktop.
Allow calendar, contacts and recording access to experience Cortana
Allow access to your calendar for schedule reminders
Allow access to your contacts for a personalized list
Allow location access to get accurate weather information
Allow access to contacts and phone to enjoy personalized calling
Allow access to phone to enjoy personalized calling
Allow recording access to experience Cortana
Allow access to your photos to continue
Failed to set wallpaper. Please turn on Storage permission to fix.
Are you sure you want to delete all?
Clear TSF Launcher settings and restart
Enjoy new themes picked just for you.
Oh my! Check out this new look!
Always on screen to lift your spirits!
Isn\'t this the theme you\'ve always wanted?
CM Launcher new version available. Update now to get better experience.
Your phone is boosted, give us a good rating to encourage us!
Your phone is protected, give us a 5-star rating to encourage us!
A premium wallpaper for you, give us a good rating if you like it.
Like our recommended apps for you? Give us a good rating to encourage us.
Your support is the power to drive our continuous improvement.
You have to restart TSF Launcher when you change this option, restart now?
Beautify your homescreen with personalized themes on CM Launcher!
This phone theme is so cool and may fit your taste. Have a try
Customize your phone with tons of stylish themes on #CMLauncher Get it now:
We have new TSF Launcher update. Please click and download.
You can change icon and wallpaper styles in Themes
Please install PhotoGrid to apply this template.
Please update PhotoGrid to apply this template.
Your phone got a makeover, and we need your encouragement to improve it!
By clicking on \"CONTINUE\" you acknowledge that\nyou have read and understood the
TSF Launcher has new version, click to install
Sorry, this theme is no longer available.
None fits in with your taste? Try to DIY your own theme now!
DIY theme is not saved. Exit now?
Thank you! Share your genius work with friends now?
Take the chance to display your genius work to world users!
Give us 5 stars if you like it :P
If you like it, please share it to support me:)
Well done！Post your theme to Themely to get thousands of followers!
Network error, please try again later.
This topic is not available right now, but we will add it soon.
Believe it or not, I design this theme by myself! Try it and show me what you got!
By tapping \"SUBMIT\", you agree CM Launcher to release the theme in your name, and all copyright belongs to the original owner.
Submission failed. Please check the network.
We will review your submission soon. Click here to check themes you have submitted.
What an awesome theme! Share it with others!
You can start from an empty folder and lasso more than one icon by circling in order to put them into that folder.
You can draw a path to view the icons contained in a folder. （note： the path should begin vertically.）

Independent layout configuration for both Landscape and Portrait screen mode.You could set the size and position of the desktop elements in Landscape and Portrait screen mode respectively, such as widget and dock bar.
When the lasso mode is activated, draw a path to lasso the icons for the next operations. When the path gets closed, there will be a pop-up menu and you can choose the correspondent option.
Flick down quickly the Music Player to activate the 3D album artwork mode.
Touch for more information or to stop the app.
You are using mobile data network. The submission will consume %s MB.
By tapping the button below, you agree that CM Launcher can use and change your submissions. Please ensure that you have the photos\' copyright.
Once the picture is selected as our wallpaper, your name will be displayed together.
Please keep the image size under 30 MB.
Start the program after running the TSF Launcher
Follow our Facebook to see if your artwork is chosen.
A picture is already being submitted. Please try later.
Submit and share your pictures with global users! Excellent ones will be selected as CM Launcher wallpapers.
Put 3rd party font files into the dir of \"/fonts\" for more choices.
Play alarm even when the phone is in silent mode
Alarm set for %s. Select to cancel.
Select to snooze or dismiss this alarm.
This widget is exclusively for TSF Launcher.
Allow access to your camera to continue
Write_Settings permission is not allowed, please click OK to enable
Select hidden activities from your favorite apps
Added the transition effect settings for entering/exiting from the App Drawer
1.Fixed arrangement error after uninstalling app in the App Drawer. 2.Fixed icon /folder /widget disappearing issue on some devices 3.Fixed other known bugs.
Animation for opening/closing full screen interface , such as folder
Recommending some excellent free TSF Shell themes
Support transparent navigation bar on Android Kitkat 4.4 or above
